Title: DSA page load >8s on PDP report views
Description: Pages with 500+ SKUs take >8s to load. GeekSpeak flagged in last 2 syncs; Lassonde mentioned in onboarding review.
PM Rationale: High churn risk + 2 active accounts reporting. Arun confirmed M effort. Blocking GeekSpeak health score recovery.

Title: Bulk export: download 10K+ SKU reports as CSV
Description: Users with large SKU sets (QVC, Lassonde) can't export full dataset. Manual workaround takes 2+ hours per report.
PM Rationale: Solid retention signal. S effort makes this high ROI. Scheduling after REQ-001 unblocks eng capacity.

Title: Multi-retailer rollup: single dashboard across Walmart + Target + Amazon
Description: Sales blocked on 3 deals — prospects ask for cross-retailer view in demo. Brian: 'We lose the comparison every time Stackline shows this.'
PM Rationale: High upsell + $500K+ renewal pipeline. Deprioritizing Q2 — L effort, eng at capacity. Revisit after Sprint-12.

Title: API p95 latency optimization (currently >4s)
Description: All customers hit >4s p95 on data fetch calls. Affects DSA dashboard responsiveness and downstream integrations.
PM Rationale: Tech debt item. Health risk is real but no direct churn signal yet. Block-scheduling with REQ-001 to avoid eng conflict.

Title: Competitor price change alerts via email/Slack
Description: CS wants to send proactive price change alerts to customers so they don't discover changes manually. 42Signals does this natively.
PM Rationale: Strong retention + upsell angle. S effort. In review with Arun for effort confirmation before sprint assignment.

Title: Share of Search: scale beyond 6 banners (GeekSpeak use case)
Description: GeekSpeak scoping requests 20+ banner configurations. Current system caps at 6. Limits deal expansion and upsell.
PM Rationale: Active customer need. M effort. Scheduling Q3 — current SoS setup (Sprint-12) must complete first to validate baseline.

Title: Scintilla pre-qualification: automate 4-question scoring
Description: Brian manually runs Scintilla pre-qual for each DSIM prospect. Automating the 4-question output would cut pipeline qualification from 2h to 10 min.
PM Rationale: Pipeline velocity play. Low effort, high future upsell. No current customer risk. Q3 target pending DSIM Phase 1 stability.

Title: Jira integration: push DSA alerts into customer Jira boards
Description: Home Depot wants alerts pushed to their Jira. Currently they pull manually. CS escalated as renewal risk item at last QBR.
PM Rationale: Renewal at risk + explicit customer ask. S effort. Checking if this can be API webhook vs full integration — affects effort score.

Title: Legacy ETL migration to Spark (infra modernization)
Description: Current ETL pipeline has 3 single points of failure. One outage = multi-hour data delay. Saurabh estimates risk is growing with data volume.
PM Rationale: Critical long-term stability item but XL effort makes Q2/Q3 infeasible. Parking with plan to spike in Q4. Accepted risk logged.

Title: Rating & review sentiment trend scoring
Description: Customers want to see review sentiment over time (positive/negative ratio trending). Currently only raw star rating shown. Profitero has this.
PM Rationale: Real gap vs Profitero but no acute churn risk. M effort with low urgency — parking Q4. Revisit if more accounts flag it.

Title: Flyer/circular intelligence for grocery segment
Description: New prospect segment (grocery chains) asking for flyer competitive tracking. No current DataWeave coverage. Brian: could open entirely new vertical.
PM Rationale: Exciting new market but XL effort + no current customer base = high risk. Parking Q1 2027. Need POC customer commitment first.

Title: DSIM: explicit reallocation output in Tableau template
Description: Lactalis and pipeline accounts need a standardized Tableau output showing budget reallocation recommendations. DS team building this now.
PM Rationale: In progress. Unlocks DSIM deal close for Bush Brothers. DS lead owns delivery. ETA: 2026-05-09.
